title: millettia ferruginea subsp. darassana
intro: Millettia ferruginea subsp. darassana, also known as Darassa or iron-plated millettia, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in African medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with the plant include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic. Darassa can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
